name: Act on the Use of Numbers to Identify a Specific Individual in Administrative Procedures
owner: Digital Agency / Personal Information Protection Commission, Japan
description: Japan's national ID-number law, effective January 2016. Establishes the Individual Number ("My Number") and Corporate Number systems and a dedicated data-protection regime for "Specific Personal Information" layered on top of APPI (secid:regulation/ppc.go.jp/appi). Chapters: I General Provisions, II Individual Number, III Individual Number Card, IV Provision of Specific Personal Information, V Specific Personal Information Protection, VI Personal Information Protection Commission, plus supplementary provisions.
relationToCloudSecurity: Any cloud service handling Japanese national ID numbers or associated "Specific Personal Information" (tax, social security, disaster response identifiers) falls under this Act's stricter security-control regime, distinct from and additional to APPI.
relationToAISecurity: Not directly addressed; relevant only insofar as AI systems process Specific Personal Information.

license.notes: Primary legislation — excluded from copyright under Japan's Copyright Act Article 13, same basis as APPI.

current_extraction.tool: pdftotext -layout + custom Python regex parser (extract_my_number_act.py, adapted from APPI's extract_appi.py)
current_extraction.notes: PDF (ppc.go.jp/files/pdf/en3.pdf) was unencrypted and extracted cleanly on the first attempt (an earlier session pass via WebFetch had failed to extract text from this same PDF; plain pdftotext succeeded where WebFetch's built-in extraction did not). 76 articles recovered. KNOWN ISSUE: this law has both main-body articles and separately-numbered supplementary provisions (附則) that restart article numbering from 1 — the parser's dedup-by-article-number logic (keep whichever has longer content) can pick the wrong one when both a main-body and a supplementary-provision article share a number. Not yet manually verified article-by-article; 18 of 76 articles have no recovered title (some may be genuinely untitled sub-articles, others may be dedup collisions). Treat as a solid first pass, not a verified-clean extraction.

scope.notes: Known main-body/supplementary-provisions numbering collision — see current_extraction.notes.
